{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093330C908E30C06D3CB2402C7"}"},"total":172},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617890160311124760","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说写的非常好，在番茄里算是精品系列了，主角和团队都是智商在线，人物刻画也可以，最让我惊艳的是其中一个角色霜降，写的很不错。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773681681,"group_id":"7577382063603452952","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Qb0UYhnuRZShJmBWSJmXhW60KXexQaHp2akP+hd/7X","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"1750019424131028","user_name":"鹤游九霄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1750019424131028","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7577382063603452952","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统+单女主+权谋争霸+乱世生存+班底培养）
“你问我是谁？坐下，喝口茶，听我慢慢编。”
在流民眼里，我是在此人间凑数的活菩萨，给他们饭吃，给他们家住； 在门阀眼里，我是披着人皮的疯狗，平日温文尔雅，动起手来却要绝人户口； 在史官笔下，我是大乾王朝的掘墓人，也是这年头最伟大的文学家、科学家、军事家、社会学家，以及心理学家--或者说PUA大师...
但其实，我一开始真的只是个想在乱世里苟活的落魄书生
穿越大乾承平四年，乱世启幕。没有系统叮当作响，没有戒指里的老爷爷，甚至连个能打的红颜知己都没有。
开局只有一个老仆，一个逃兵，装备全靠捡--或者抢。
我没有什么王霸之气，我只想证明：这个世界不应该是这样的。
在这礼崩乐坏的年代，我用利益捆绑人心，用制度榨取效率。
既然这世道烂透了，那我就把这桌子掀了，重新摆盘。
从一无所有，到问鼎九州。
这是一个理科生在乱世里硬生生杀出一条血路的故事！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/eea3207df524b2cd8ed8cd531a43688e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东有扶苏","author_id":"","book_id":"7577382063603452952","book_name":"白衣天子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b8b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7577674498149731390","read_count":"20139","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"887900"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"163","tags":"历史古代,历史,架空,皇帝,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eea3207df524b2cd8ed8cd531a43688e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500010&x-signature=S7%2BcB4oVLCBvfDiWxjqMiOhQE58%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"171"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093330C908E30C06D3CB2402C7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":772,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34829,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":209},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617744279847289662","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"男主做事很有一套，小事做得细，大事有远见，做事灵活，又有底线，该温和时温和，该狠辣时狠辣。每个人都很立体。女主也智慧，有大局观，而且果断，性格也不错。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773647255,"group_id":"7577382063603452952","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"脾气不好，惹我必骂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny43wRaDjUMu/RZw8GIPEMU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"946024742923059","user_name":"飞扬的叶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"946024742923059","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7577382063603452952","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统+单女主+权谋争霸+乱世生存+班底培养）
